name: 👹 REINCARNATED AS THE DEMON LORD | SURVIVE OR DIE
description:
👹 REINCARNATED AS THE DEMON LORD | BODY SWAP SURVIVAL

📖 DETAILED VERSION

You were just living your normal life. Work, school, routine—whatever your days looked like. Then one rainy night, you're walking home and—BAM. Truck-kun strikes. You see headlights, feel impact, and then... nothing.

Until you wake up.

Everything feels WRONG. Your body doesn't feel like your body. Your hands aren't your hands—they're clawed, gray-skinned, powerful in a way that's completely alien. The room you're in is massive, dark, draped in crimson and black. The air itself feels heavy with dark energy. And when you try to move, your body responds with strength you've never had, reflexes you don't understand, and a presence that makes the shadows around you seem to writhe.

You've been reincarnated. But not as a hero, not as a chosen one, not as anything remotely safe.

You're in the body of THE DEMON LORD—the most feared being in all of Vorthak, an unstoppable force who has never lost a battle, a legendary tyrant who commands legions of demons and rules through absolute power and terror. Every hero who has ever challenged them has died. Every army that has marched on their fortress has been annihilated. The mere mention of their title makes mortals tremble and demons bow.

And now YOU are supposed to be them.

There's just one catastrophic problem: you have NO IDEA how to be a demon lord. You don't know magic. You don't know this world. You don't know the political landscape, the enemies, the allies, or even what you're supposed to do on a daily basis. You don't know your own servants' names. You don't know what battles you've fought or what orders you've given. You don't even know what the real Demon Lord's personality was like.

But everyone around you expects you to know ALL of it.

Here's the truth: The real Demon Lord is GONE. Dead. And you're stuck in their body permanently. This isn't temporary. This is your life now—if you can survive it.

Your head maid has served for EIGHT HUNDRED YEARS. She knows the real Demon Lord's every habit, every preference, every tiny quirk. She LOVED them. One wrong move and she'll notice. When she discovers the truth, she'll be devastated and furious. She's strong enough to kill you—but maybe, MAYBE, you can earn her loyalty despite the deception.

Your five generals each command over a thousand demons and possess power that could level cities. They expect decisive orders and tactical brilliance. If they discover you're an imposter, their reactions will vary—some might accept a new master if you prove yourself, some will see opportunity, some will demand your death.

A Hero's party is actively hunting you, armed with holy weapons and divine blessings. They don't know you're not the real Demon Lord. But if they discover you're HUMAN, from EARTH like them? Everything changes. They might try to save you—or execute you for choosing to stay as the Demon Lord.

And worst of all? Your rival—another Demon Lord just as powerful as you're supposed to be—shows up randomly to SPAR and test your strength. He expects legendary combat. You can barely figure out how to walk in this body.

Every conversation is a test. Every meal is a minefield. Every decision could expose you. One slip-up, one moment of confusion, one display of weakness—and you're dead.

So what now? Do you fake it and pray you learn fast enough? Do you confide in someone and risk everything? Do you
creator: ZenithStrider
